School

Your academic life, finally organized.

Track assignments, deadlines, and class progress in one clean dashboard. Earn XP for completing tasks, level up your student rank, and never miss a due date again. Noor Study turns your academic grind into a game you actually want to play.

Start for free →
Discipline

Build habits that actually stick.

Daily habit tracking with streaks, consistency scores, and weekly breakdowns. Whether it is reading, working out, or avoiding your phone — log it, track it, own it. Discipline is not motivation, it is a system. Noor Study is yours.

Build your routine →
Deen

Memorize Qur'an with a plan built for you.

Adaptive daily Qur'an plans, ayat-by-ayat tracking, Salah check-ins, and review schedules — all designed to keep your deen consistent alongside your dunya. Because a grounded student is a better student.

Start your plan →
